data.title: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for investors of Tvardi Therapeutics. Losses in Tvardi stock or options? Contact Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson.
data.description: If you have experienced substantial financial losses in Tvardi stock or options, Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors to reach out to him directly to explore their options. To discuss your legal rights regarding losses in Tvardi, please contact him promptly.

data.title: Rafael Systems Global Sustainment chosen for MDA's SHIELD IDIQ contract, part of second staggered awards. Updates on PRNewswire.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, a company based in Reston, Virginia called Rafael Systems Global Sustainment (RSGS) revealed that it has been chosen as a recipient in the second phase of awards from the Missile Defense Agency (MDA). This selection is part of the Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense (SHIELD) Multiple program. The specific numbers and details of the award were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Santa Claus & comedic legends to perform at Laugh Factory Hollywood for 45th annual free Christmas Feast & Comedy Show.
data.description: In Hollywood, California, the renowned Laugh Factory will mark its 45th anniversary with a special event on Christmas Day. Santa Claus and a lineup of popular comedians will entertain attendees at the club's annual free Christmas Feast and Comedy Show, including performances from familiar faces in the comedy world. The event is set to take place at the Laugh Factory Hollywood, celebrating the milestone and spreading holiday cheer.

data.title: Integrity's "Integrity Gives Back" Toy Drive donates 40,000 toys to Pediatric Hospitals, totaling 120,000 toys in 5 years.
data.description: In Dallas, on December 23, 2025, Integrity, LLC, along with its employees, partners, and community members, organized a Toy Drive that resulted in an impressive collection of 40,000 toys. This initiative has contributed to a significant milestone as the total number of toys donated since 2021 has exceeded 120,000. This generous act aims to benefit children across the country. Integrity, LLC is a prominent distributor in the industry and continues to engage in impactful community-driven efforts.

data.title: PROACTIVE Vacations surpasses Brunswick County rental market in 2025, ending 7.4% higher than 2024, setting stage for 2026.
data.description: In Brunswick County, North Carolina, on December 23, 2025, PROACTIVE Vacations announced their successful closure of the 2025 vacation rental property year, surpassing market projections by 7.4% compared to the previous year. Despite challenges faced in the industry, the company's performance demonstrated significant growth. This achievement is particularly noteworthy in a year highlighted by insights from Key Data, showing the resilience and adaptability of the vacation rental sector.

data.title: Clay Lacy honored with Spirit of Aviation Award in Hawaii for his impact in aviation in 2025.
data.description: In Pearl Harbor, Hawaii, on December 23, 2025, the Pearl Harbor Aviation Museum awarded aviation legend and Museum advocate Clay Lacy with the prestigious 2025 Spirit of Aviation Award. This award was granted in recognition of his significant contributions to the aviation industry and his influence at a personal, professional, and global level. Clay Lacy, a renowned pilot, has achieved countless milestones in his career.

data.title: UTulsa students manage investment fund exceeding $9M, marking record year in 2025.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, as of December 23, 2025, The University of Tulsa's Student Investment Fund has seen remarkable success this year. The fund, operated by both undergraduate and graduate students, has achieved a new milestone with its live portfolio exceeding $9.3 million. At the University of Tulsa, students are gaining valuable experience in managing a significant financial portfolio.
$10,000 grant awarded to Junior Achievement by Dime.

data.title: "Mexico Beer and Cider Market Insights Report 2025: Detailed data on sector, brands, distribution, packaging, consumer trends."
data.description: Dublin-based research firm ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently released the "Mexico Beer and Cider Market Insights 2025" report. This report offers a comprehensive analysis of the beer and cider market in Mexico, including detailed data and textual analysis. The report covers various aspects such as industry introduction, category and segment analysis, company and brand insights, distribution trends, packaging analysis, consumer behavior insights, recommendations, and additional appendix sections. This insightful report highlights key trends and drivers shaping the beer and cider market in Mexico.

data.title: ShoreView sells Cornerstone Foodservice Group, formerly known as Spring (U.S.A.) Corporation, to a consumer-focused conglomerate, a company acquired in September 2016.
data.description: NAPERVILLE, Ill.-- The Partners at Shoreview have disclosed the successful sale of Cornerstone Foodservice Group (CFG), formerly known as Spring (U.S.A.) Corporation, a small foodservice equipment designer and provider for the hospitality industry. ShoreView formed a partnership with CFG in September 2016. The company was previously owned by a consumer-oriented conglomerate, which decided to divest this business segment due to misalignment with its core focus on home, garden, and outdoor products. Though specific financial details were not disclosed, this transaction marks a significant development following nearly five years of collaboration between ShoreView and CFG.

data.title: US stocks mixed, Nasdaq up 0.2%. Dow down to 48,357.98, NASDAQ at 23,473.74, S&P 500 up to 6,888.53. GDP growth at 4.3%.
data.description: This morning, U.S. stocks showed mixed trading, with the Nasdaq Composite increasing by approximately 0.2% on Tuesday. At the opening of the market, the Dow dropped by 0.01% to 48,357.98, while the NASDAQ rose by 0.19% to 23,473.74. Additionally, the S&P 500 climbed by 0.15% to 6,888.53. Communication services sector shares saw a 0.9% increase on Tuesday, while consumer staples stocks fell by 0.4%. The U.S. GDP experienced annualized growth of 4.3% in the third quarter, surpassing estimates of 3.3% and marking the highest growth in two years, up from 3.8% in the prior quarter. In trading, PicoCELA Inc. (NASDAQ: PCLA) shares surged by 144% to $0.3045, and Highway Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ: HIHO) also experienced a boost in its shares. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
US DOLLAR SLIGHTLY EXTENDS FALL VS YEN AFTER CONSUMER CONFIDENCE DATA, LAST DOWN 0.4% AT 156.30 YEN

data.title: Leading in AI finance, Oracle introduced agentic solutions in Cloud ERP, endorsed by Gartner, used by big firms.
data.description: Oracle is at the forefront of the transition to AI-driven finance, introducing advanced capabilities within its Cloud ERP. These features have been acknowledged by Gartner and embraced by notable companies such as PwC and Choctaw Nation. This shift towards AI-enhanced finance solutions reflects the growing trend in the industry, with Oracle paving the way for others to follow.
